creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-ports-bugs->timur

Over to committer of net/nss-pam-ldapd. 

Note: there is indeed an entry in MOVED now; however, net/nss_ldapd remains 
connected in net/Makefile, and net/nss-pam-ldapd has not yet been connected. 
Therefore, everything is inconsistent; this looks like an incomplete repocopy. 

The entry from MOVED: 

revision 1.2171 
date: 2010/07/15 23:04:03;  author: timur;  state: Exp;  lines: +2 -1 
net/nss_ldapd was renamed into net/nss-pam-ldapd
